# MuleSoft Mule Runtime

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.12) of Mule Runtime documentation.
> See [Mule Runtime llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-runtime/llms-full.txt) for all the Mule Runtime documentation in one file.
